line 11: Couldn't resolve reference to 't'.: Uninitialized temporal variable 't' used in assumption -> Replace 't' with a valid temporal expression like '0.0 -> pre(t) + delta_t' or declare 't' as a temporal variable
line 12: Couldn't resolve reference to 'delta_t'.: Uninitialized temporal variable 'delta_t' used in assumption -> Replace 'delta_t' with a valid temporal expression like '0.0 -> pre(delta_t) + step' or declare 'delta_t' as a temporal variable
line 13: mismatched input '"minHeightAllowed"' expecting RULE_ID: String literal used as identifier in const declaration -> Remove quotes from 'minHeightAllowed' to make it a valid identifier
line 14: mismatched input '"recovery_time"' expecting RULE_ID: String literal used as identifier in const declaration -> Remove quotes from 'recovery_time' to make it a valid identifier
line 15: Couldn't resolve reference to 'height'.: Uninitialized variable 'height' used in guarantee -> Replace 'height' with a valid expression or declare 'height' as a temporal variable

mismatched input '=' expecting ':': Invalid syntax in AGREE const declaration -> Change 'const minHeightAllowed = 200.0;' to 'const minHeightAllowed : real = 200.0;'
mismatched input '=' expecting ':': Invalid syntax in AGREE const declaration -> Change 'const recovery_time = 3.7;' to 'const recovery_time : real = 3.7;'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'height'.: Variable 'height' is not properly declared in AGREE scope -> Change 'var height: real = altitude;' to 'var height : real = altitude;'
Couldn't resolve reference to 't'.: Variable 't' is not properly declared in AGREE scope -> Change 'var t: real = 0.0 -> pre(t) + delta_t;' to 'var t : real = 0.0 -> pre(t) + delta_t;'
left and right sides of binary expression '>=' are of type '<error>' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Invalid expression due to unresolved references -> Change 'guarantee "height_greater_than_min": (t >= 3.7) => (height > minHeightAllowed);' to 'guarantee "height_greater_than_min": (t >= 3.7) => (height > minHeightAllowed);'
missing EOF at 'var': syntax error in AGREE annex due to incomplete statement -> add semicolon after 'delta_t' declaration on line 14
